rows.name: rename_visitors_to_app_users
replace_discovery_card_limit_rules
statements:
alter table public.discovery_runs
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_card_limit_check;

alter table public.discovery_runs
  drop column if exists card_limit,
  add column if not exists slot_target_count integer not null default 4,
  add column if not exists filled_slot_count integer not null default 0,
  add column if not exists cards_after_slots_filled integer not null default 0,
  add column if not exists post_slot_full_card_limit integer not null default 3,
  add column if not exists skips_after_last_save integer not null default 0,
  add column if not exists post_last_save_skip_limit integer not null default 10,
  add column if not exists last_saved_at timestamptz,
  add column if not exists end_reason text;

alter table public.discovery_runs
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_slot_target_count_check,
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_filled_slot_count_check,
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_cards_after_slots_filled_check,
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_post_slot_full_card_limit_check,
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_skips_after_last_save_check,
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_post_last_save_skip_limit_check,
  drop constraint if exists discovery_runs_end_reason_check;

alter table public.discovery_runs
  add constraint discovery_runs_slot_target_count_check
    check (slot_target_count between 1 and 20),
  add constraint discovery_runs_filled_slot_count_check
    check (filled_slot_count >= 0 and filled_slot_count <= slot_target_count),
  add constraint discovery_runs_cards_after_slots_filled_check
    check (cards_after_slots_filled >= 0),
  add constraint discovery_runs_post_slot_full_card_limit_check
    check (post_slot_full_card_limit between 0 and 20),
  add constraint discovery_runs_skips_after_last_save_check
    check (skips_after_last_save >= 0),
  add constraint discovery_runs_post_last_save_skip_limit_check
    check (post_last_save_skip_limit between 1 and 50),
  add constraint discovery_runs_end_reason_check
    check (
      end_reason is null
      or end_reason in (
        'slots_filled_grace_exhausted',
        'skip_streak_after_save',
        'feed_exhausted',
        'user_exit'
      )
    );

comment on table public.discovery_runs is
  'One discovery flow. It does not use a fixed 12-card limit. It ends after slots are filled plus 3 more cards, or after 10 skips since the last save.';

comment on column public.discovery_runs.slot_target_count is
  'Number of save/route slots to fill during this discovery run.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.filled_slot_count is
  'How many save/route slots are currently filled.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.cards_after_slots_filled is
  'Number of cards advanced after filled_slot_count reaches slot_target_count.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.post_slot_full_card_limit is
  'End discovery after this many cards once slots are full. Default is 3.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.skips_after_last_save is
  'Number of X/skip actions since the latest save.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.post_last_save_skip_limit is
  'End discovery after this many X/skip actions since the latest save. Default is 10.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.last_saved_at is
  'Timestamp of the latest save action in this discovery run.';
comment on column public.discovery_runs.end_reason is
  'Why this discovery run ended.';

rows.name: clarify_discovery_run_comment
statements:
comment on table public.discovery_runs is
  'One discovery flow. It ends after slots are filled plus 3 more cards, or after 10 skips since the last save.';

rows.name: screen_review_tables
notify_taste_match
statements:
create table if not exists public.notify_taste_results (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  email text not null,
  choices jsonb not null,
  character_key text not null,
  character_name text not null,
  share_slug text not null unique,
  referrer_share_slug text references public.notify_taste_results(share_slug) on delete set null,
  compatibility_score integer,
  compatibility_summary text,
  user_agent text,
  referrer text,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
  constraint notify_taste_results_email_valid
    check (email ~* '^[^[:space:]@]+@[^[:space:]@]+[.][^[:space:]@]+$'),
  constraint notify_taste_results_choices_array
    check (jsonb_typeof(choices) = 'array' and jsonb_array_length(choices) = 10),
  constraint notify_taste_results_choices_values_valid
    check (not jsonb_path_exists(choices, '$[*] ? (@ != "A" && @ != "B")')),
  constraint notify_taste_results_character_key_valid
    check (character_key in ('quiet_collector', 'route_planner')),
  constraint notify_taste_results_score_valid
    check (compatibility_score is null or compatibility_score between 0 and 100)
);

create index if not exists notify_taste_results_referrer_share_slug_idx
  on public.notify_taste_results(referrer_share_slug);

create index if not exists notify_taste_results_created_at_idx
  on public.notify_taste_results(created_at desc);

create index if not exists notify_taste_results_email_idx
  on public.notify_taste_results(email);

alter table public.notify_taste_results enable row level security;

create table if not exists public.notify_taste_events (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  event_name text not null,
  share_slug text,
  referrer_share_slug text,
  metadata jsonb not null default '{}'::jsonb,
  user_agent text,
  referrer text,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
  constraint notify_taste_events_name_valid
    check (event_name in (
      'page_view',
      'choice_complete',
      'email_submit',
      'result_view',
      'share_click',
      'compatibility_view'
    )),
  constraint notify_taste_events_metadata_object
    check (jsonb_typeof(metadata) = 'object')
);

create index if not exists notify_taste_events_name_created_at_idx
  on public.notify_taste_events(event_name, created_at desc);

create index if not exists notify_taste_events_share_slug_idx
  on public.notify_taste_events(share_slug);

create index if not exists notify_taste_events_referrer_share_slug_idx
  on public.notify_taste_events(referrer_share_slug);

alter table public.notify_taste_events enable row level security;
